name: Jon Gordon
abstract: Jon Gordon (born 1966 in New York City) is an American jazz saxophonist who leads the Jon Gordon Quartet. In 1996, he won first prize in the Thelonious Monk International Jazz Saxophone Competition.

concerts.label: The New York Pops: A Jazz Valentine
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Goodwin
about_quotes.evidence: We had a guest, Bob Dorough and Jon Gordon the alto player, the young alto player. And so we were doing this gig
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Goodwin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 28, 2025
